positive: A lush, highly detailed, symmetrical celestial woodland scene featuring stylized forest animals (fox, deer, owl, rabbits) intertwined with blooming floral elements, delicate vines, and bioluminescent mushrooms. The artwork should be rendered in a sophisticated botanical illustration style, combining crisp black ink line art with soft, saturated watercolor gradients. Central composition, designed to fit on apparel. Dramatic contrast, vibrant but cohesive color palette of emerald green, sapphire blue, and gold accents. Studio lighting, high resolution, intricate detailing, elegant symmetry, perfect for screen printing.
